'''Maltaz''' was an [[Galactic Empire/Legends|Imperial]] [[General/Legends|general]] who commanded [[Battle Group Turak]] during the [[Battle of Turak IV]]. During [[Battle of Turak IV|the assault]], Maltaz ordered two [[Battalion/Legends|battalions]] of the [[Imperial Hammers Elite Armor Unit/Legends|Imperial Hammers Elite Armor Unit]] to assault the main [[Uratai Basin Base|Alliance base]] directly while he attempted to flank the installation to the west. However, his advance was stalled by the Alliance having mined the western approach to their base, and his forces were cut off and decimated.
